generated_oml:
// Acting Component
instance HeatBedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heat‑bed providing thermal actuation to raise temperature inside the insulated incubator, commanded by the controller."
]

// Sensing Components
instance InternalTempSensorBox1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor located inside the incubator box (position 1)."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DataTransmittedInternalBox1
]

instance InternalTempSensorBox2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor located inside the incubator box (position 2)."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DataTransmittedInternalBox2
]

instance ExternalTempSensorBox : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor located outside the incubator box."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DataTransmittedExternalBox
]

// Data Transmitted from Sensors
instance DataTransmittedInternalBox1 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTempSensorBox1
]

instance DataTransmittedInternalBox2 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTempSensorBox2
]

instance DataTransmittedExternalBox : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ExternalTempSensorBox
]

// Data Instances (raw temperature readings)
instance TemperatureDataBox1 : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped temperature reading from internal sensor box 1."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DataTransmittedInternalBox1
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MonitoringEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance TemperatureDataBox2 : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped temperature reading from internal sensor box 2."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DataTransmittedInternalBox2
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MonitoringEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance TemperatureDataExternal : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped temperature reading from external sensor."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DataTransmittedExternalBox
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MonitoringEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

// Enablers (algorithms & platforms)
instance MonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Collects temperature streams and actuator states for continuous monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousMonitoringService
]

instance CalibrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Runs calibration, fault detection, state estimation and optimisation algorithms to update model parameters."
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlParameterOptimizationService
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Executes predictive thermal simulation models under current operating conditions."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance SafetyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Detects violations of temperature limits and triggers safety alerts."
    DTDFVocab:enables SafetyMonitoringService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Generates advanced visualisations of temperature trajectories and model predictions."
    DTDFVocab:enables AdvancedVisualizationService
]

instance ReconfigurationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Supports re‑configurability of the control strategy when environment or payload changes."
    DTDFVocab:enables ReconfigurationSupportService
]

// Services
instance ContinuousMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous monitoring of all temperature sensor streams and actuator states."
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureTrendInsight
]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive simulation reproducing and forecasting the incubator’s thermal behaviour."
    DTDFVocab:provides ForecastedTemperatureInsight
]

instance ControlParameterOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of control parameters via calibration algorithms that update the thermal model."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizedControlParametersInsight
]

instance SafetyMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Safety‑oriented monitoring that detects temperature limit violations and triggers alerts."
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureLimitViolationInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides AlertOperatorAction
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustHeatingPowerAction
]

instance AdvancedVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Advanced visualisation of temperature trajectories and model predictions for engineers and operators."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance ReconfigurationSupportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Re‑configurability support allowing adaptation of the control strategy to new conditions."
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdateControlStrategyAction
]

// Insights
instance TemperatureTrendInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on current temperature trends inside the incubator derived from continuous sensor streams."
]

instance ForecastedTemperatureInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on forecasted temperature evolution based on predictive simulation models."
]

instance OptimizedControlParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on optimized heating power set‑points computed by calibration algorithms."
]

instance TemperatureLimitViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of temperature exceeding predefined safety limits."
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Graphical representation of temperature trajectories and model predictions."
]

// Actions
instance AlertOperatorAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generates an alert for human operators when a safety violation is detected."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance AdjustHeatingPowerAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatically adjusts the heat‑bed power to bring temperature back within safe bounds."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance UpdateControlStrategyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Updates the control algorithm configuration in response to environmental changes."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// Models
instance SimpleThermalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simple analytical thermal model with two free parameters representing heat‑bed dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance DetailedThermalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Detailed analytical thermal model with four free parameters capturing thermal inertia of the heat‑bed."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

// Model Prediction Data
instance SimpleModelPredictionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature prediction output from SimpleThermalModel."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance DetailedModelPredictionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature prediction output from DetailedThermalModel."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveSimulationService
]

// Edge Computing Platform (Enabler)
// The Raspberry Pi aggregates the enablers modelled as a generic component to avoid class‑disjoint conflicts.
instance RaspberryPiEdgeController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi edge computing platform that executes control software, calibration and monitoring algorithms."
    base:contains MonitoringEnabler
    base:contains CalibrationEnabler
    base:contains SimulationEnabler
    base:contains SafetyEnabler
    base:contains VisualizationEnabler
    base:contains ReconfigurationEnabler
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin can influence the Physical Twin when a monitor detects a safety or performance violation; it may issue control actions (e.g., adjust heat‑bed power or fan speed) through the Raspberry Pi to the actuators. The documents do not specify command formats, validation, or acknowledgement mechanisms."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is evaluated by experimentally comparing the two temperature prediction models against measured incubator temperatures; the four‑parameter model showed higher fidelity in reproducing the heat‑bed’s thermal inertia. Validation is performed through these experiments, and calibration algorithms continuously update model parameters to minimize prediction error. Sources of uncertainty include the free model parameters and sensor measurement noise, which are quantified and corrected via calibration. Ongoing quality assurance is maintained by the monitoring loop described in Document 1."
]
